word: G3792 - ὀχλοποιέω - ochlopoiéō - okh-lop-oy-eh'-o - Gather a company

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Gather a company
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to collect a crowd, to gather the people together
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G3793 and G4160; to make a crowd, that is, raise a public disturbance: - gather a company.
